code:
stateDiagram
  direction LR
  [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> Queued:Workflow Submitted
  Queued --> Running:Started First Step
  Queued --> Failed:Problem starting First Step
  Running --> InProgress:Succeeded Non-Terminal Step
  InProgress --> Running:Started Next Step
  Queued --> Cancelled:Cancelled by User
  Running --> Cancelled:Cancelled by User
  Running --> Completed:Succeeded Final Step
  Paused --> Running:Resumed by User
  Running --> Paused:Paused by User
  InProgress --> Paused:Paused by User
  InProgress --> Cancelled:Cancelled by User
  Failed --> InProgress:Retrying Step
  Failed --> Queued:Resubmitted by User
  Cancelled --> InProgress:Retrying Step
  Cancelled --> Queued:Resubmitted by User
  Completed --> Queued:Resubmitted by User
  Queued --> Paused:Paused by User
  Paused --> Queued:Resumed by User

  Queued:queued
  Running:running
  Failed:failed
  InProgress:in_progress
  Cancelled:cancelled
  Completed:completed
  Paused:paused

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业PLC的工作流状态画一个状态图。核心是从IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic出发，经过Queued、Running，最终到达Completed或者Failed。方向从左到右。
明白，Queued是初始状态。那Running之后是直接到Completed，还是中间有个过渡？工业流程通常有步骤执行中的状态。
对，需要加InProgress。Running启动第一步后进入InProgress，表示正在执行具体步骤。如果步骤成功但非最终步骤，就回到Running启动下一步；如果是最终步骤成功，才到Completed。
好的，我加上InProgress，以及Running到InProgress、InProgress回Running的循环。另外用户需要能暂停和取消吧？
是的，需要Paused和Cancelled两个状态。Queued、Running、InProgress都应该能转到Paused和Cancelled。Paused可以恢复回原来的状态或者Queued。
确认一下：Paused恢复时，Running和InProgress暂停的回到Running，Queued暂停的回到Queued？另外Cancelled和Failed之后能重试吗？
Paused恢复都到Running不太对——Queued暂停的应该回到Queued。重试方面，Failed和Cancelled可以Retrying Step回到InProgress，或者Resubmitted by User回到Queued。Completed也可以Resubmitted回到Queued重新执行整个工作流。
修正了，Paused到Queued的恢复单独处理。还有Queued启动失败应该直接到Failed，我补上了Queued -- Failed的转换。现在所有状态标签也用下划线格式统一了。
检查一遍：IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic提交到Queued，Queued可以Started First Step到Running，也可以因为启动问题直接Failed。Running和InProgress之间循环处理多步骤，最终到Completed。暂停、取消、重试的回路都齐全。方向LR，可以定稿了。
